prompt: Validate zocomputer-obsidian prompt source files against static policy assertions.
assertions: private-managed-service: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/prompts/password-protected.md contains "managed public Zo HTTP service"
public-managed-service: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/prompts/public-readonly.md contains "managed public Zo HTTP service"
password-generation: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/prompts/password-protected.md contains "generate a strong password via CLI"
password-generation: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/prompts/password-protected.md contains "report it to me at the end"
private-safe-vault-default: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/prompts/password-protected.md contains "Do not scan for or expose existing personal vaults"
public-safe-vault-default: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/prompts/public-readonly.md contains "Do not scan for or infer existing personal vaults"
completion-not-localhost-only: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/SKILL.md contains "managed public Zo HTTP service URL"
completion-not-localhost-only: skills/zocomputer-obsidian/SKILL.md contains "localhost-only process is not complete"
